description: If an Employee has a negative basic_salary, the function raises a ValueError and does not proceed with calculation.
evidence_quote: raise ValueError("Basic salary cannot be negative.")

description: Provident fund is calculated as the integer part of 22% of the basic salary.
Dearness allowance is calculated as the integer part of 10% of the basic salary.
Housing allowance is calculated as the integer part of 40% of the basic salary.
Other deductions are set to a fixed value of 50.
Total earnings are the sum of basic salary, dearness allowance, and housing allowance.
Total deductions are the sum of provident fund and other deductions.
Net pay is calculated by subtracting total deductions from total earnings.
The function returns a dictionary containing employee_code, basic_salary, dearness_allowance, housing_allowance, provident_fund, other_deductions, total_earnings, total_deductions, and net_pay.
evidence_quote: return { "employee_code": employee.employee_code, "basic_salary": employee.basic_salary, "dearness_allowance": dearness_allowance, "housing_allowance": housing_allowance, "provident_fund": provident_fund, "other_deductions": other_deductions, "total_earnings": total_earnings, "total_deductions": total_deductions, "net_pay": net_pay, }
